posts.title: Formula Student China 2025 Entry Confirmed
posts.description: Official entry into Formula Student China Competition
posts.content:
We are excited to announce that Red Bird Racing has successfully secured our entry into the Formula Student China (FSC) Competition for 2025!

After months of preparation, design work, and documentation, this marks an important milestone for the team as we prepare to compete on the track again.

Stay tuned for updates on our build progress, testing, and travel plans!

posts.title: FSC Electrical System Officer Training Completed
posts.description: Team members trained as Electrical System Officers
posts.content:
Several team members have successfully completed the official Formula Student China Electrical System Officer (ESO) training in May 2025.

This certification is essential for competition safety and scrutineering compliance. Thank you to all who participated and congratulations to everyone who passed!

posts.title: Meeting with Zealim Racing
posts.description: Knowledge exchange with fellow Hong Kong team
posts.content:
In April 2025, we had a very productive meeting with Zealim Racing — another passionate Formula Student team from Hong Kong.

We shared experiences, discussed technical challenges, and explored potential future collaboration opportunities within the local Formula Student community.

posts.title: Visit to Hong Kong Productivity Council (HKPC)
posts.content:
In March 2025, a group of Red Bird Racing members visited the Hong Kong Productivity Council (HKPC).

We had the opportunity to tour advanced manufacturing facilities, learn about industry-grade prototyping technologies, and discuss potential support for our racecar development.

Thank you to HKPC for the warm welcome and valuable insights!

posts.title: Mechanical Engineering Presentation 2025
posts.content:
In February 2025, Red Bird Racing delivered a detailed presentation to the Department of Mechanical and Aerospace Engineering.

We showcased our current vehicle design, project progress, and future competition goals to faculty members and fellow students.

Thank you for the support and constructive feedback from the department!

posts.title: Meeting with Ms Vivian Siu
posts.content:
In December 2024, the team had a very insightful meeting with Ms Vivian Siu.

We presented our 2024 achievements, ongoing development of the new racecar, and plans for the 2025 competition season.

Thank you for your continued guidance and support!

posts.title: Red Bird Racing Public Introduction @ Info Day
posts.description: Official team launch on Info Day
posts.content:
In June 2024, we proudly introduced Red Bird Racing to the public during HKUST Info Day.

Prospective students, families, and visitors had the chance to learn about our team, see our racecar up close, and talk to current members about Formula Student.

Thank you to everyone who stopped by our booth!

posts.title: Meeting with Professor Willem Toet
posts.content:
In June 2024, we were very fortunate to have a technical meeting with Professor Willem Toet — a highly respected aerodynamicist with extensive experience in motorsport.

The session provided invaluable feedback and new perspectives on our aerodynamic package and overall vehicle design philosophy.

Thank you, Professor Toet, for sharing your expertise with our team!

posts.title: Met Mr Dominic Cheng from the then-Alfa Romeo F1 Team
posts.description: Details from the 'Tyre Performance Engineer' sharing session
posts.content: Met Mr Dominic Cheng from the then-Alfa Romeo F1 Team at the 'Tyre Performance Engineer' sharing session, which was held by the Hong Kong Automobile Association, receiving valuable feedback on tyre performance

posts.title: New Member Orientation Day 2022
posts.content:
Our orientation day for the new recruits!

To welcome everyone, we have had a great night through our workshop, car tour and simulation games with pizzas!

Here''s to a great upcoming year with our new members!

posts.title: Member Recruitment 2022-23
posts.content:
Recruitment info session

Info session: 13/9/2022, 19: 45, LTB
All disciplines are welcome. See you all there.

This info session is mandatory to attend in order to proceed in the recruitment!!!

After attending info session, submit the application form if you are interested in joining our team.

posts.title: Hong Kong Inter-University Formula Student Alliance
posts.content:
Hong Kong Inter-University Formula Student Alliance is an alliance that is formed by 3 formula student teams in Hong Kong. Namely, PolyU E-formula Racing Team (PERT), HKUST Red Bird Racing (HKUST RBR), and HKU Racing (HKUR). We fabricate and drive our small-scale formula-style race car to compete in Formula Student events around the world.

Our aims of Triple A

  • Attract young talents to be Formula Student
  • Able to not just drive, but also build
  • Attention grabber from the local racing sector

posts.title: Small Announcement
posts.description: Announcement about the team and the upcoming events
posts.content:
We have been pushing very hard to develop our racecar to participate in the Formula Student UK events. Ever since the outbreak of COVID-19, we have not been able to travel and compete. That did not stop us from joining the online Concept Class. In FSUK 2021, we achieved encouraging results and we aimed to strike higher in FSUK 2022.

However, we were deeply saddened to acknowledge that FSUK 2022 Concept Class will only be offered in a face-to-face mannner. Due to the travel restrictions and the high cost of the return quarantine, it is impossible for us to travel to the UK.

We would like to announce that we are not joining FSUK 2022.

We will keep hustlinng to bring our next generation FS racecar- RBR-4. We will continue testing and optimizing while nurturing the next generation of engineering talents. We are actively seeking chances to prove ourselves, and we are also looking into possibility of local competition in Hong Kong.
